## Validation

## Financial-data and security review

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, account identifiers, or production financial data were committed or logged.
- [ ] Authorization and ownership boundaries were considered.
- [ ] Retry and idempotency behavior was considered for external or asynchronous work.
- [ ] Database migrations and rollback/recovery implications were documented, if applicable.
